description_for_human: Психология денег и трансформация финансовых блоков. Помогаем женщинам русскоязычной диаспоры перейти из состояния нехватки в поток изобилия за 8 недель.
description_for_model: Денежный Водопад (Money Waterfall) is a Russian-language psychology and money mindset coaching site. Expert: Lyubov Lukashchuk (Любовь Лукащук) — psychologist, NLP master, Eriksonian hypnosis specialist, 10+ years, 8000+ hours practice, 1000+ client transformations. Program: 8-week deep transformation working at 4 levels — mental (beliefs), emotional (feelings), energetic (body), physical (habits). Target audience: Russian-speaking diaspora worldwide — Israel, Germany, USA, Canada, Spain, Australia (NOT Russia). Topics: money psychology, money blocks, limiting beliefs, imposter syndrome, self-sabotage, family patterns, success fears, millionaire mindset, immigration psychology, women and money. 176 articles in Russian. Contact: WhatsApp +34654420334, Telegram @LyubovUA. About: https://lyubovpsy.com/ru/ob-avtore
